expectations.evidence: No overview table. Has a text-based Dependency Graph at the bottom
Tasks use Summary/What to build format — no narrative Description or Technical decisions block
Uses plain bullet-point acceptance criteria, not Given/When/Then scenarios
No Out of Scope sections on any task
Context is thin but doesn't punt to 'see the spec'
Covers schema, API, worker, retry, UI CRUD, UI logs
Uses Summary/What to build/Depends on format, not the template pattern
